_score_injection_doc: No INJECTION_PROOF block was present in this BA dispatch prompt; per the score-injection echo contract fail-safe, all four fields are set to null and no values fabricated.

requirement.original: Add a positive regression test for the CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID fallback path in scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py.
requirement.clarified: Add one new test method test_succeeds_with_only_claude_code_session_id to class TestWriteBulkCommitSentinelScript in hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py. The test strips CLAUDE_SESSION_ID from env, sets only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, runs _writer.main, and asserts rc==0 and sentinel sid==CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID value.
requirement.what: New test method in an existing test class for the env-fallback branch of _resolve_sid()
requirement.why: Prior cycle (dev-20260529-081000) deferred this Codex finding as Won't Have; this cycle addresses it. The CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID branch had no positive test coverage.
success_criteria: All pre-existing tests in the class still pass
constraints: TemporaryDirectory must be the outer context manager; patch.dict nested inside; all assertions inside TemporaryDirectory block (Codex BLOCKER #1 fix)
CLAUDE_SESSION_ID must be stripped from env in addition to CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID before setting the fallback value

root_cause_analysis.symptom: No positive test covers the CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID-only fallback path in _resolve_sid()
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: TestWriteBulkCommitSentinelScript covers CLAUDE_SESSION_ID success, absence failure, and TTL — but not the fallback from CLAUDE_SESSION_ID-absent to CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID-present. The prior cycle deferred this finding explicitly.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: f551a24 fix(hooks): strip CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID from env in test_fails_without_session_id (prior cycle fixed the negative test; positive fallback test was deferred)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: The deferred-explicitly-in-prior-cycle pattern: Codex caught the gap during dev-20260529-081000 but BA classified it as Won't Have to keep that cycle's scope minimal.
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: If _resolve_sid() fallback logic is ever broken (e.g. or precedence changed), no test would catch it until the negative test fires for the wrong reason.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Gap present since the test class was created; first documented in dev-20260529-081000 Codex findings.
observations: hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py:170-205: TestWriteBulkCommitSentinelScript has 3 tests; none tests CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID-only (observed: Read lines 170-205)
scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:56: env_sid uses 'or' short-circuit; CLAUDE_SESSION_ID priority confirmed (observed: Read lines 53-65)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Read hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py:170-205 confirmed no test sets only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID. Read scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py:53-65 confirmed or-based fallback logic.

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: not_applicable: not a regression; test gap was present from initial creation and explicitly deferred in prior cycle

pre_existing_guards.code_snippet: env = {k: v for k, v in os.environ.items() if k not in ("CLAUDE_SESSION_ID", "CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID")}
pre_existing_guards.purpose: Strips both SID env vars before the negative test; the new positive test reuses this pattern and adds back only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID

development_approach.strategy: Add one method to TestWriteBulkCommitSentinelScript. Use TemporaryDirectory as outer context manager, patch.dict nested inside. Strip both SID env vars in the comprehension, then add back only CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID. Place all sentinel file assertions inside the TemporaryDirectory block (Codex BLOCKER #1 fix).
development_approach.validation_approach: Run pytest hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py -v and assert all 4 tests pass (3 pre-existing + 1 new).

_blast_radius_skip_reason: SMALL tier — single test-file change with no cross-module import surface; blast radius tool not warranted.
_risk_level_doc: low: adds one test method to an existing test class; no writer, guard, or infra change. Regression risk is negligible.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex found 1 BLOCKER and 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY. BLOCKER: temp directory is deleted before sentinel assertions run because the assertions were outside the TemporaryDirectory() block in the draft. OBSERVATION_ONLY: scope is otherwise minimal and aligned.

findings.issue: Assertions are outside TemporaryDirectory() block in the draft — tmpdir is deleted before glob runs, len(files) is 0, test is vacuous
findings.proposed_fix: Move TemporaryDirectory to outer context; patch.dict nested inside; all assertEqual assertions after patch.dict exits but still inside TemporaryDirectory
findings.rationale: Real runtime bug — confirmed by comparing with existing test_writes_valid_sentinel_file which correctly keeps assertions inside TemporaryDirectory. Corrected implementation now in AC1 and Technical Hints.

findings.issue: Scope is otherwise minimal and aligned — no expansionist patterns found
findings.rationale: Confirmation that scope is correctly bounded.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: BLOCKER #1 applied: test implementation in AC1 and Technical Hints now uses TemporaryDirectory as outer context, patch.dict as inner context, with all assertions inside TemporaryDirectory block. This matches the pattern of the existing test_writes_valid_sentinel_file.
